data.content: Review rejected: the active-view formatting fix in src/app/beats/page.tsx is directionally correct and covered by src/app/beats/__tests__/page-active-agent-info.test.ts, but this implementation also bundles unrelated settings UI changes (src/components/agent-display-label.tsx, src/components/settings-pools-section.tsx, src/components/settings-sheet.tsx) and agent-pool runtime diagnostics/state changes (src/lib/agent-pool.ts) that are outside the knot description. tsc, test, and build passed during review; full lint did not complete within the review window, so it was not fully re-verified.
